s: In 1979, Phil Huffman suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.770, WHIP 1.660, SO 56, WAR 0.500.
Changed teams after the previous season (TOR -> BAL).
In 1985, Phil Huffman suited up for BAL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 15.430, WHIP 2.570, SO 2, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined BAL.
